name: chart-line-dots-colors
visual_summary: A line chart displaying a series of data points with colored dots, useful for showing trends and patterns over time within a specific context or to visualize data evolution in specific projects.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready chart component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-line-dots-colors
Description: A line chart displaying a series of data points with colored dots, useful for showing trends and patterns over time within a specific context or to visualize data evolution in specific projects.
Style: bright, minimal
Interactions: 
Tags: chart, line, data visualization, project management

Requirements:

- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation

- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
